'''ngodhahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolbachial|wolbachial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolbachial|wolbachial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngodhahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhahithi|ngodhahithi]] || [[word:ngodhahiji|ngodhahiji]] || [[word:ngodhahishi|ngodhahishi]] || [[word:ngodhahiki|ngodhahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhahuthuthu|ngodhahuthuthu]] || [[word:ngodhahujuju|ngodhahujuju]] || [[word:ngodhahushushu|ngodhahushushu]] || [[word:ngodhahukuku|ngodhahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhahuthu|ngodhahuthu]] || [[word:ngodhahuju|ngodhahuju]] || [[word:ngodhahushu|ngodhahushu]] || [[word:ngodhahuku|ngodhahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhahufthuf|ngodhahufthuf]] || [[word:ngodhahufjuf|ngodhahufjuf]] || [[word:ngodhahufshuf|ngodhahufshuf]] || [[word:ngodhahufkuf|ngodhahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhahethe|ngodhahethe]] || [[word:ngodhaheje|ngodhaheje]] || [[word:ngodhaheshe|ngodhaheshe]] || [[word:ngodhaheke|ngodhaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhahothotho|ngodhahothotho]] || [[word:ngodhahojojo|ngodhahojojo]] || [[word:ngodhahoshosho|ngodhahoshosho]] || [[word:ngodhahokoko|ngodhahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhahotho|ngodhahotho]] || [[word:ngodhahojo|ngodhahojo]] || [[word:ngodhahosho|ngodhahosho]] || [[word:ngodhahoko|ngodhahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhahofthof|ngodhahofthof]] || [[word:ngodhahofjof|ngodhahofjof]] || [[word:ngodhahofshof|ngodhahofshof]] || [[word:ngodhahofkof|ngodhahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŠthĂŠ|ngodhahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŠjĂŠ|ngodhahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŠshĂŠ|ngodhahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhahĂŠkĂŠ|ngodhahĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhahathatha|ngodhahathatha]] || [[word:ngodhahajaja|ngodhahajaja]] || [[word:ngodhahashasha|ngodhahashasha]] || [[word:ngodhahakaka|ngodhahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhahatha|ngodhahatha]] || [[word:ngodhahaja|ngodhahaja]] || [[word:ngodhahasha|ngodhahasha]] || [[word:ngodhahaka|ngodhahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhahafthaf|ngodhahafthaf]] || [[word:ngodhahafjaf|ngodhahafjaf]] || [[word:ngodhahafshaf|ngodhahafshaf]] || [[word:ngodhahafkaf|ngodhahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngodhahasha|ngodhahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhahshĂ«sha|ngodhahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhahrosha|ngodhahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhahmusha|ngodhahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhahyasha|ngodhahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhahnkshĂ«sha|gongodhahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhahnkrosha|gongodhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhahnkmusha|gongodhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhahnkyasha|gongodhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngodhadhahasha|ngodhadhahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhadhahshĂ«sha|ngodhadhahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhadhahrosha|ngodhadhahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhadhahmusha|ngodhadhahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhadhahyasha|ngodhadhahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhadhahnkshĂ«sha|gongodhadhahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhadhahnkrosha|gongodhadhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhadhahnkmusha|gongodhadhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhadhahnkyasha|gongodhadhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngedhĂŠhasha|ngedhĂŠhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠhshĂ«sha|ngedhĂŠhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠhrosha|ngedhĂŠhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠhmusha|ngedhĂŠhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠhyasha|ngedhĂŠhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠhnkshĂ«sha|gongedhĂŠhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠhnkrosha|gongedhĂŠhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠhnkmusha|gongedhĂŠhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠhnkyasha|gongedhĂŠhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngodhfahasha|ngodhfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhfahshĂ«sha|ngodhfahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhfahrosha|ngodhfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhfahmusha|ngodhfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhfahyasha|ngodhfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhfahnkshĂ«sha|gongodhfahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhfahnkrosha|gongodhfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhfahnkmusha|gongodhfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhfahnkyasha|gongodhfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
